name: Pancit Bijon Guisado (Sauteed Rice Sticks)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Rice sticks, soaked in hot water about 15 minutes, then drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken and pork to a boil in 1 1/2 cups of water. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes. Remove from heat; when cool enough to handle, slice the meat into small pieces. Reserve the broth.
2. Heat oil in a very large, wide saute pan. Saute onion and garlic until onion is transparent. Add meats, shrimp, soy sauce, and fish sauce, and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
3. Over high heat, add cabbage, carrots, celery, salt, pepper, and 1 cup of broth. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
4. Set aside 1 cup of the mixture.
5. Reduce heat to low and add rice sticks, stirring gently with wooden spoons until heated through and mixed with meat and vegetables, about 3 minutes.
6. If the mixture seems dry, add more broth. Transfer to a platter, spooning the reserved mixture on top, and garnish with chopped scallions, cilantro, and egg slices.
7. Squeeze lime over each serving and sprinkle additional garnishes. Serve with soy sauce.
